description: CompositionBlack polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, short sleeves, buttoned chest placket, graphic print and appliquéd branding on the left chest, embroidered branding on the left sleeve and a vented hemFitRegularWash careHand wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, scrub or dry cleanFlat dry inside outWarm iron inside outIf you need a T-shirt to keep you feeling fresh, then you've found it here. basics knows what your needs are when it comes to practical essentials which will make you look and feel great.
